request.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<litleOnlineRequest merchantId="123456" version="12.0" xmlns="http://www.litle.com/schema">
  <authentication>
    <user>username</user>
    <password>password</password>
  </authentication>
  <sale reportGroup="Default" id="order_001">
    <orderId>ORD-2026-001</orderId>
    <amount>2999</amount>
    <orderSource>ecommerce</orderSource>
    <card>
      <type>VI</type>
      <number>4111111111111111</number>
      <expDate>1228</expDate>
      <cardValidationNum>349</cardValidationNum>
    </card>
    <billToAddress>
      <name>John Smith</name>
      <addressLine1>123 Main St</addressLine1>
      <city>Anytown</city>
      <state>MA</state>
      <zip>02101</zip>
      <country>US</country>
    </billToAddress>
  </sale>
</litleOnlineRequest>
